name: Free
description: Start your professional journey with our completely free plan. Ideal for students, fresh graduates, and anyone who wants to create a basic but clean resume without any cost. Get access to essential tools to build your first resume quickly and easily.

name: Starter
description: Designed for freelancers and early-career professionals who need more flexibility and better presentation. This plan gives you access to a wider selection of templates and essential export options to help you stand out in job applications.

name: Pro
description: The most popular plan among job seekers and professionals. Packed with advanced tools that help you create highly optimized, visually appealing resumes that pass Applicant Tracking Systems and catch the attention of recruiters.

name: Premium
description: Unlock the full potential of our platform with AI-powered assistance. This plan is perfect for serious job seekers who want to save time, improve content quality, and get every possible advantage in today's competitive job market.

name: Team
description: Built for small teams, recruitment agencies, and companies that need to manage multiple resumes efficiently. Collaborate seamlessly, maintain brand consistency, and streamline the entire resume creation process for your organization.

name: Yearly Pro
description: Enjoy all the powerful features of the Pro plan with significant savings. Perfect for users who are committed to long-term career growth and want to avoid monthly billing while getting extra value through extended access and updates.

name: Lifetime
description: Make a one-time investment and enjoy unlimited access forever. This plan is ideal for professionals who want complete peace of mind without worrying about recurring payments, while still receiving all future updates and new features.

name: Enterprise
description: Tailored solutions for large organizations, enterprises, and educational institutions. Get custom integrations, dedicated support, enhanced security features, and scalable solutions designed specifically for your team's unique requirements.

name: Student
description: Specially crafted for current students and recent graduates with limited budget. Get professional resume building tools at a heavily discounted rate while still enjoying most of the advanced features to help you land your first job or internship.
